featureName: Sprint 8 — Two Complete Marketplace Flows: Task-Based Bidding + Direct Hire
description: Implement two complete marketplace flows. Flow 1: Client posts task → Worker bids → Client reviews bids, messages bidder → Accepts bid → Worker starts work → Task completes → Mutual reviews. Flow 2: Worker advertises services → Client browses provider directory → Views profile → Hires directly (skips bidding) → Worker accepts/declines → Task completes → Mutual reviews. Includes new Provider Directory, direct hire system, improved chat, and UX fixes.

userStories.title: Fix Message Button on PublicProfileScreen + Direct Chat Support
userStories.description: Wire up the non-functional Message button on PublicProfileScreen. Add direct chat support (chat without a task context).
acceptanceCriteria: Add createDirectChat(uid1, uid2, otherUserName) method to ChatRepository that creates a chat with taskId=null, chatId='direct_{sorted_uids}'
Make ChatModel.taskId nullable (String?) if not already, update fromJson/toJson accordingly
On PublicProfileScreen, wire the 'Message' button: call createDirectChat, navigate to ChatThreadScreen
ChatThreadScreen AppBar: show other user's name when taskTitle is null (direct chat)
ChatListScreen: handle chats with null taskId gracefully (show other user's name instead of task title)
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Bid Cards — View Provider Profile + Message Bidder
userStories.description: Enhance bid cards so the poster can view a bidder's profile and message them before accepting.
acceptanceCriteria: In BidListSection _BidCard: make provider avatar and name tappable, navigate to /profile/:providerId
Add provider's average rating (stars) display on bid card if available
Add a 'Message' icon button on each pending bid card
Tapping Message creates a task-scoped chat between poster and bidder using existing createOrGetChat(taskId, posterId, bidderId)
Navigate to ChatThreadScreen after chat creation

userStories.title: Pending Reviews Section on Home Screens
userStories.description: After task completion, show review prompts on both poster and provider home screens.
acceptanceCriteria: On PosterHomeScreen: add 'Pending Reviews' section showing completed tasks where poster has not yet left a review

userStories.title: Integration Test — Flow 1: Task-Based Bidding End-to-End
userStories.description: Write and run an integration test that verifies the complete Flow 1: Alice posts task → Ben bids → Alice messages Ben → Alice accepts bid → Ben starts work → Alice marks complete → Both review.
acceptanceCriteria: Create integration_test/flow1_task_bidding_test.dart
Use two accounts: Alice (poster) and Ben (provider), created via Firebase emulator
Step 1: Alice registers, posts a Cleaning task (S$60, Ang Mo Kio)
Step 2: Switch to Ben, register as provider, find task in Discover, submit bid (S$55)
Step 3: Switch to Alice, view task detail, see Ben's bid, tap Message on bid card, send message in chat
Step 4: Alice accepts Ben's bid, verify task status=assigned
Step 5: Switch to Ben, open task detail, tap 'Start Work', verify status=inProgress
Step 6: Switch to Alice, tap 'Mark as Complete', verify status=completed
Step 7: Alice leaves review for Ben (4 stars), Ben leaves review for Alice (5 stars)
Step 8: Verify reviews exist in Firestore
All steps pass, cleanup emulator data
flutter analyze shows 0 errors

userStories.title: Integration Test — Flow 2: Direct Hire End-to-End
userStories.description: Write and run an integration test that verifies the complete Flow 2: Ben sets up provider profile → Alice browses directory → Alice hires Ben directly → Ben accepts → Task completes → Both review.
acceptanceCriteria: Create integration_test/flow2_direct_hire_test.dart
Use two accounts: Alice (poster) and Ben (provider)
Step 1: Ben registers as provider, sets up profile with serviceCategories=[cleaning], rates, availability
Step 2: Switch to Alice, register as poster, go to Discover → toggle to Providers
Step 3: Alice sees Ben in provider directory, taps to view profile
Step 4: Alice taps 'Hire' on Ben's profile, posts a direct hire task (Cleaning, S$50, Ang Mo Kio)
Step 5: Verify task in Firestore: isDirectHire=true, status=assigned, assignedProviderId=Ben
Step 6: Switch to Ben, verify 'Job Offers' section shows the task on ProviderHome
Step 7: Ben opens task detail, taps 'Accept Job', verify status=inProgress
Step 8: Alice and Ben exchange chat messages
Step 9: Alice marks task complete, verify status=completed
Step 10: Both leave reviews, verify in Firestore
All steps pass, cleanup emulator data
flutter analyze shows 0 errors
